name: Edivoxetine
description: Edivoxetine is a drug which acts as a selective norepinephrine reuptake inhibitor and is currently under development by Eli Lilly for attention-deficit hyperactivity disorder (ADHD) and as an antidepressant treatment. It was in phase III clinical trials, in 2012, for major depressive disorder, but failed to get approval.

interactions.name: Acemetacin
interactions.description: The therapeutic efficacy of Acemetacin can be decreased when used in combination with Edivoxetine.
